about.title: About Me
about.name: Wei
about.intro1: Hi, I'm Wei, a full-stack developer passionate about data and frontend engineering. Currently studying Data Science at Shangqiu Normal University, focusing on data visualization and AI engineering.
about.intro2: I believe good technology should be like water — transparent, fluid, and everywhere. From Python data analysis to Vue 3 full-stack development, from ECharts visualization to LLM agent orchestration, I seek the most elegant solutions at the intersection of data and interface.
about.intro3: In my spare time, I enjoy writing blog retrospectives, submitting PRs to open-source libraries, and experimenting with new tech stacks. This blog is a centralized showcase of all my projects and a window for me to engage with the world.
about.valueSimplicityDesc: Remove all unnecessary complexity until nothing more can be removed.
about.valueDataDrivenDesc: Let data speak, and let visualization make data speak for itself.
about.valueIterationDesc: Build fast, validate fast, optimize fast.
about.ctaDesc: If you have any interesting project ideas, or just want to chat about tech, feel free to reach out.
